topics.query_en: Backtracking algorithms state space tree pruning explanation
topics.query_ar: شرح خوارزميات التراجع backtracking state space tree
topics.reason: Visualizing the recursive calls and understanding exactly when and how to prune the search space can be highly abstract and confusing.

topics.topic_ar: نسبة التقريب وضمانات الأداء في الخوارزميات
topics.query_en: Approximation algorithms approximation ratio performance guarantee
topics.query_ar: شرح خوارزميات التقريب approximation algorithms ratio
topics.reason: Proving that an algorithm's output is always within a certain mathematical factor of the unknown optimal solution requires rigorous proofs.

topics.topic_ar: خوارزمية التقريب لمسألة البائع المتجول المتري
topics.query_ar: شرح مسألة البائع المتجول TSP approximation algorithm
topics.reason: Combining Minimum Spanning Trees, Eulerian circuits, and the triangle inequality to prove the 2-approximation bound is conceptually dense.

topics.query_ar: شرح مسألة تعبئة الصناديق bin packing algorithm
topics.reason: Analyzing the worst-case bounds and understanding the mathematical proofs for why sorting items improves the approximation ratio is challenging.
